form.formComment: Didn't make the placings last time at Q Lakeside (20.41) in a Grade 5, finishing a 7 length seventh. Goes well out of this box with a win and five minors. Leading player.

form.formComment: Surprised two starts back at Capalaba to win by a nose in 20.41, beating Where's My Rum. Last start finished 6th on March 30 over 300m at this track behind Colonel's Ranger beaten 7 lengths (16.94) in a Grade 5. Is a danger.
